title: Quality of Life of the Mentally Disabled 1991: Severely Disabled
description: The project on the quality of life of the mentally disabled was set in motion by the research unit of the Finnish Association on Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities in 1989. The data were collected with the help of video observation and questionnaires aimed at their support persons, because interviews were not possible to conduct. The quality of life of the severely disabled was studied from several viewpoints. Their support persons, such as nurses or family members, assessed the housing
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
